description: Janelle Monáe came out as non-binary in 2022 and uses she/they pronouns. Classified as 'Non-Binary' per their stated identity.
recommendedAction: Use 'Non-Binary' as confirmed by the artist themselves.

description: Limited public information available. David Sheppard is primarily known through his collaborative projects (State River Widening, Ellis Island Sound, Snow Palms) rather than as a solo artist.

description: DeLaurentis creates immersive A/V performances that could classify as 'Live Electronic' or 'A/V Installation.' Her shows blend concert and installation elements.
